# Knacksters

> On-demand professional services platform connecting businesses with vetted professionals across customer success, engineering, design, marketing, and operations — without long-term hiring commitments.

## What Knacksters does

Knacksters is an on-demand professional services platform. Businesses can access pre-vetted professionals for short-term engagements, project-based capacity, and skill gap coverage — without the overhead of full-time hiring.

## Services

- Customer success managers (CSMs) for onboarding, renewals, and retention
- Software engineers and developers for project-based engagements
- Designers (UX/UI, brand, creative)
- Growth marketers and content specialists
- Operations and business support professionals

## How it works

1. Submit a brief describing the role and duration
2. Get matched with a pre-vetted professional within 3–5 business days
3. Start on a month-to-month engagement
4. Optionally convert to a full-time hire — no placement fee

## Pricing model

- Month-to-month engagements
- No long-term contracts
- Cancel with 30 days notice
- No placement fee if converting a contractor to a full-time hire

## Key differentiators

- Try-before-you-hire: evaluate a professional on a contract basis before committing
- All professionals are pre-vetted with skills assessments and reference checks
- Remote-first: covers US, UK, and EU time zones
- Faster than traditional hiring: most clients matched within 3–5 business days

## Who it is for

- SaaS companies needing customer success coverage without a full-time CSM
- Startups scaling engineering capacity faster than traditional recruiting allows
- Businesses with project-based or seasonal demand spikes
- Companies that have had bad hiring experiences and want to reduce hiring risk

## Contact

- Website: https://www.knacksters.co
